text: Entering this brightly lit, modern hallway, I feel a quiet sense of anticipation as I approach the glass doors, glimpsing the colorful display inside. Stepping closer to the vibrant R+D wall, I am drawn to the theme of research and innovation, pondering how we continuously redefine our relationship with technology and machines. The atmosphere is both curious and reflective—a celebration of intellect and creative inquiry. I feel inspired by possibility, but also aware of the responsibility that comes with progress.
